texto: All parents set out with expectations, hopes and dreams for their child. When a child is diagnosed with a health problem, these aspirations are altered. While one parent is hoping to see their child graduate from university, another is praying that they can live pain free
explicacao: Citação de Sharon Dempsey sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “All parents set out with expectations, hopes and dreams for their child.
